name: chr22_22p_acrocentric_short_arm_NOR
description: 22p acrocentric short arm hosting a rDNA NOR (~300 copies of 43 kb 45S rRNA unit) and proximal SDs shared with chr13p, 14p, 15p, 21p (interacrocentric homology >99%). Hot spot for Robertsonian translocations involving chr22 (rob(13;22), rob(14;22), rob(15;22), rob(21;22)).

architecture.internal_structure: Distal satellite (BSAT/ACRO), rDNA tandem array, proximal interchromosomal SD junctions to other acrocentric short arms.
